result.evidence_summary: No evidence of a cross-country ski race named 'Falls Creek to Hotham Crossing' found in any search results. The route exists as a popular summer hiking trail (Falls to Hotham Alpine Crossing) and a walking/endurance event (Australian Grand Traverse), but no mentions of organized cross-country skiing events, results, news, or listings on Worldloppet/FIS/Ski Classics. Other results are ski cross races at Mt Hotham, not cross-country.
